sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63557" key="liposite/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπο-σῑτέω</orth>, <sense id="n63557.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be in want of corn</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bread</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
